# Ising Model

	2. Example_Animation.ipynb

## Animation Library
# Overview:
This library uses Object-Oriented Programming principles to provide users with a library of functions/classes to create and animate simulated Ising Models. All functions/classes can be found in OOP_Animated.py, and an example of their usage can be found in Example_Animation.ipynb

	- Numpy
	- Matplotlib
## Ensemble_Measurements.py
# Overview:
This Script simultaneously runs a series of ising models at different temperatures and records system information such as net magnetization and total energy
# Technical Details:

# Dependencies:
	- Numpy
